engine.measurement_policy: voice-quality metrics restricted to sustained voiced notes; deterministic scoring rubric v1

pitch.range_semitones_note: Robust range (2.5th-97.5th percentile of voiced frames). Immune to single octave-error frames.

voice_quality.interpretation: Mild breathiness or intentional grit; normal sung-note perturbation; elevated amplitude perturbation.

reference.note: Speech norms are for sustained spoken vowels; sung notes with vibrato run naturally higher. Interpretation above uses singing-oriented bands.

harmonic_balance.note: Global tonal-balance descriptor over the whole file (includes silence/consonants). NOT clinical HNR — see voice_quality.hnr_db_median.

dynamics.reference_note: dB relative to the loudest frame in this file (internal contrast, not absolute loudness).

rhythm.tempo_confidence: low (isolated vocal stem — beat tracking expects a full mix)

intonation.caveat: Grid-deviation is a proxy: expressive slides, blue notes and non-12-TET material register as deviation. Interpret alongside the recording context.

problem_zones.note: Low reliable vocal pitch detection in this window.

Strong forward/bright energy. Useful for cut, but can also include room bleed or harsh mic capture.

environment_risk.note: No obvious global capture-risk marker was detected.

visual_diagnostics.note: Supporting visual diagnostics. In karaoke/live-room recordings, backing track bleed and mic clipping can affect these traces.

technical_score.provenance: deterministic_rubric_v2 — computed from measured audio features; identical audio yields an identical score; no LLM involvement; anchored to professional reference distribution

intonation_accuracy.input: median abs grid deviation = 30.0 cents — matches or beats 9.1% of 11 pro references
intonation_accuracy.formula: 10 at pro-reference median (20.0 cents), 0 at 45 cents, linear

pitch_stability.input: median intra-note drift = 28.2 cents — matches or beats 36.4% of 11 pro references
pitch_stability.formula: 10 at pro-reference median (24.0 cents), 0 at 80 cents, linear

voice_quality.input: jitter = 1.4946% — matches or beats 0.0% of 11 pro references; shimmer = 13.3435% — matches or beats 27.3% of 11 pro references; HNR = 11.69 dB — matches or beats 27.3% of 11 pro references
voice_quality.formula: mean of jitter/shimmer/HNR sub-scores (Praat, per sustained note)

vibrato_control.input: 34.1% of long notes carry vibrato (10 at >=40%); rate 5.04 Hz (ideal 5.27-5.95); extent 57.7 cents (ideal 57.5-85.7); intra-note drift 28.2 cents (straight-tone path)
vibrato_control.formula: best of vibrato-quality path and straight-tone steadiness path (consistent straight tone is a valid professional style)

dynamics_expression.input: phrase-level spread 26.88 dB (ideal 18.55-38.33); effective range 49.28 dB (ideal 22.48-48.12)
dynamics_expression.formula: best of phrase-level shaping and effective range (mastered/compressed stems limit raw range through no fault of the singer)

phrase_control.input: median phrase length = 2.26 s — matches or beats 36.4% of 11 pro references
phrase_control.formula: 10 at pro-reference median (2.67 s), 0 at 0.5 s, linear

technical_score.scope_note: Technical execution only. Artistry, emotion, interpretation and style-appropriateness are human judgements and are not part of this number. Any 'listener impact' figure elsewhere in a report is a subjective estimate, not a measurement.

diagnostic_flags.flag: Sustained notes landing off the pitch grid
diagnostic_flags.likely_cause: Ear-to-onset calibration, or breath pressure bending sustained pitch.
diagnostic_flags.intervention: Slow sirens onto held target notes with drone reference

diagnostic_flags.interpretation: Strong forward placement. Good projection and cut.
diagnostic_flags.likely_cause: Aryepiglottic twang / raised larynx / wide oral cavity.
diagnostic_flags.intervention: Maintain — no correction needed. Monitor for laryngeal elevation.
